Name: .NET Core - Check .NET Core Framework Version
Description: Check if given .NET Core framework version (or greater) is installed.

Parameters.Name: TargetVersion
Parameters.Label: Target .NET Core framework version
Parameters.HelpText: The target .NET Core framework version you expect to be installed in the machine. For example, 2.0.5.

Parameters.Name: Exact
Parameters.Label: Exact
Parameters.HelpText:
If you check "Exact", it means the installed .NET Core framework version MUST match target version.

Otherwise, as long as the installed .NET Coreframework version is greater than or equal to target version, the check will pass.

Parameters.Name: CheckASPdotNETCore
Parameters.Label: Check ASP.NET Core Module
Parameters.HelpText: If you check "Check ASP.NET Core Module", it means this step will check if ASP.NET Core module is installed in the host or not.
